Hi Anjella, I think I have found the issue. SDNC does not start for me as it exits due to it not finding certifivcatres. I assume you have these locally and that is why it works for you but not for me or on Jenkins. See below:

2022-02-04 17:11:07,870 - root - INFO - Connected status: True
2022-02-04 17:11:07,872 - root - ERROR - Error while extracting zip file(s). Exiting Certificate Installation.
2022-02-04 17:11:07,872 - root - INFO - Error details : [Errno 13] Permission denied: '/opt/opendaylight/current/certs/keys0'
Stoppping SDNR container due to failure in installing Certificates

Maybe Joe can help you solving the cert issue I wonder if it is related to my question on the yaml cert location folder...
